name: VeloDevopsCommand
description: Staged developer console commands for system modification and maintenance

command_type.description: Classified type (e.g., EDIT_FILE, CREATE_MODULE, DEPLOY, ROLLBACK)

requested_by_email.description: Email of the admin who issued the command

status.description: Command status (draft, staged, validated, approved, blocked, archived)

staged_patch_summary.description: Summary of proposed code or configuration changes

validation_summary.description: Results of simulated tests or validation checks

linked_deployment_request_id.description: Reference to a deployment request record

ubuntu_activation_notes.description: Instructions for executing this on Ubuntu after migration
